properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Beautiful Lord, wonderful Saviour I know for sure all of my days are held in Your hand Crafted into Your perfect plan

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You gently call me into Your presence Guiding me by Your Holy Spirit Teach me dear Lord, to live all of my life Through Your eyes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm captured by Your Holy calling Set me apart, I know You're drawing me to Yourself Lead me Lord, I pray

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take me and mold me, use me, fill me I give my life to the Potter's hand Hold me, You guide me, lead me, walk beside me I give my life to the Potter's hand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You gently call me into Your presence Guiding me by Your Holy Spirit Teach me dear Lord, to live all of my life Through Your eyes

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm captured by Your Holy calling Set me apart, I know You're drawing me to Yourself Lead me Lord, I pray

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Take me and mold me, use me, fill me I give my life to the Potter's hand Hold me, You guide me, lead me, walk beside me I give my life to the Potter's hand

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Take me and mold me, use me, fill me I give my life to the Potter's hand Hold me, You guide me, lead me, walk beside me I give my life to the Potter's hand

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I'm captured by Your Holy calling Set me apart, I know You're drawing me to Yourself Lead me Lord, I pray

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Take me and mold me, use me, fill me I give my life to the Potter's hand Hold me, You guide me, lead me, walk beside me I give my life to the Potter's hand
